en: Hello everyone. Here we go.
A: Please stand up! Salute!
B: Hello.
A: Please sit down.

ab: Nga’ayho, pasifana’ ko singsi titaanan to kakaenen no ‘Amis.
ch: 大家好。今天老師要教大家食物的阿美語怎麼說。
en: Hello everyone. Today I am going to teach you how to say Ami for food.

ab: Mahapinang iso ko nisowalan no singsi haw?
en: A: Do you understand what the teacher says?

ab: Singsi, caay ka hapinang ako, liyawen haca a somowal.
ch: B:老師，我不懂。可以再說一次嗎?
en: B: I don’t understand. Can you repeat it again?

ab: Caay ka tengil ako, nga’ay ta’angayen ko ngiha’ haw?
ch: B:我聽不到，可以大聲一點嗎?
en: I can’t hear you, can you speak louder?

ab: Pinengneng itini! Tooren kako a misa’osi.
ch: 請看這裡! 跟著我唸一遍。
en: Look here, please! Repeat after me.
It’s very well read.

ab: Liyawenho a misa’osi, sa ta’angayen ko ngiha’.
en: Read it again. Please speak louder.
Please be quiet. Don’t talk.
A: Please take out your textbook.
B: Yes, sir.
A: Please take out your pen.
B: I forgot to bring my pen.
A: Please take out the eraser.
B: I forgot to bring my eraser.

ab: Caliwen kono tihi iso a sasipasip.
ch: A:請跟旁邊同學借橡皮擦。
en: A: Please borrow erasers from your classmates.

ab: Nga’ay a pacaliwenho kako to sapisipasip haw?
en: B: Can I borrow your eraser?
Class is over.

ab: Tahini aca ko pitilid ita, liyaw sato a lipay a masaso’araw kita.
ch: 我們就上到這邊，下週再見。
en: Class dismissed, see you next week.
